records.question: Which ships named HMS Gorgon flagged in Panama, built in 1998 or later, of type Panamax, and class Third-rate ship of the line have a Midshipman captain named Captain Beves Conway?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE ship.flag = 'Panama' AND captain.name = 'Captain Beves Conway' AND captain.rank = 'Midshipman' AND ship.type = 'Panamax' AND ship.name = 'HMS Gorgon' AND captain.class = 'Third-rate ship of the line' AND ship.built_year >= 1998.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT Ship.Ship_ID FROM Ship JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID WHERE Ship.Name = 'HMS Gorgon' AND Ship.Flag = 'Panama' AND Ship.Built_Year >= 1998 AND Ship.Type = 'Panamax' AND Ship.Class = 'Third-rate ship of the line' AND captain.Name = 'Captain Beves Conway' AND captain.Rank = 'Midshipman'

records.question: Which ships built in 1998 or later have the Panama flag, belong to class KR, and are captained by Lieutenant Montagu Verling?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE ship.built_year >= 1998.0 AND ship.flag = 'Panama' AND captain.name = 'Lieutenant Montagu Verling' AND ship.class = 'KR'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ship.Ship_ID FROM Ship 
JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID 
WHERE Ship.Built_Year >= 1998 
AND Ship.Flag = 'Panama' 
AND Ship.Class = 'KR' 
AND captain.Name = 'Lieutenant Montagu Verling'

records.question: Which ships named HMS Gorgon were built in 1998 or earlier, have class KR, and are captained by Captain Gilbert Pears who is 60 years old and commands a Third-rate ship of the line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE ship.built_year <= 1998.0 AND ship.name = 'HMS Gorgon' AND captain.class = 'Third-rate ship of the line' AND captain.age = '60' AND ship.class = 'KR' AND captain.name = 'Captain Gilbert Pears'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ship.Ship_ID 
FROM Ship 
JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID 
WHERE Ship.Name = 'HMS Gorgon' 
AND Ship.Built_Year <= 1998 
AND Ship.Class = 'KR' 
AND captain.Name = 'Gilbert Pears' 
AND captain.age = '60' 
AND captain.Class = 'Third-rate'
